subject: Tort Law
module: The Nature and Function of Tort Law

lessons.title: Nature and Function of Tort Law
lessons.description: So, what is a tort? A tort is a civil wrong — other than a breach of contract or a breach of trust — for which the law provides a remedy.

lessons.title: FE-1 Tort Paper Structure and Exam Strategy
lessons.description: The FE-1 Tort paper consists of eight questions. You must answer five.
